Defines a vibration pattern with a long pulse of 500ms duration and 50 strength.

# Purpose
This JSON configuration file defines a vibration pattern for a device. The `comments` field provides a description of the pattern as "Standard (Long Pulse) - Low." The `notes` array contains an object with the `id` of `long_pulse`, specifying a vibration duration of 500 milliseconds, a brake duration of 0 milliseconds, and a strength level of 50. The `pattern` field lists the sequence of vibrations to execute, which includes the `long_pulse` pattern. The `repeat_delay_ms` field sets a delay of 1000 milliseconds between repetitions of the pattern.
